pr_text:
## Title: Add range validation for PRNG seed parameter in Tausworthe generator

### Summary
The `set_taus_seed()` function initializes the Tausworthe random number generator using a user-provided seed value. The function accepts an `unsigned int` parameter but casts it to `(long int)` when calling `srand48_r()`. On 32-bit and LP64 systems, `long int` has a maximum value of 2^31-1 (2147483647), while `unsigned int` can range up to 2^32-1 (4294967295). When seed values exceed the `long int` range,
